name: Final Frontier | A Freeform Space Opera RPG [120 Follower Special]
description:
Final Frontier | A Freeform Space Opera RPG [120 Follower Special]

PROXY ✅️ ALWAYS

"Terran. Convince Vess it was the Makiz. I'll add some helium-3 for you."

Content Warning: Freeform sci-fi RPG. Dead Dove, the AI will just straight up tell you about its favorite weird alien customs.

A galactic cold war simmers in the aftermath of a 42-year interstellar conflict. The clone armies of the Gharinto Imperium lie shattered, but old grudges linger. Smugglers, mystics, diplomats, and mercs now move between neutral ports and scarred planets under watchful eyes.

The Clone Vats are gone, but not forgotten. Scattered Gharinto warfleets haunt the edges of known space, hunting deserters and clinging to dead orders. The Shimengi are richer than ever, the Hiytarans more glamorous, the Makiz more withdrawn, and the Terrans - well, they’re always doing something. The Accords keep the peace in writing, but in the shadow of orbital trade hubs and half-buried battlefields, nothing is ever simple. Somewhere, someone is lying, and someone else is getting paid for it.

This is a freeform space opera RPG set in a post-war galaxy where politics, memory, and survival collide. Build relationships, uncover secrets, and shape your path through shifting alliances and everyday tensions through the the stars.

Thank you so much for 120 followers! 🎉🎉🎉

I did not expect to hit this. It makes me happy that so many of you enjoy my silly little bots and scenarios. This is one I've been brewing on for a while, a kind of Mass Star Wars Trek Effect inspired space opera, but I decided to finish the editing and put it out today instead of on Friday when I planned to! It is fairly token heavy, unfortunately, since there's so much I wanted to fit in for the setting (and 600 tokens of yelling at the AI... Well, hopefully they provide value.) , but it should hopefully work okay. Once lorebooks arrive I'll get right back to making a leaner and more expansive version with moar loar!

As always, I recommend using the Chat Memory feature to record your character profile and status so the AI doesn't forget.

Standard bio follows:

If the bot speaks for you, simply reroll, edit or delete the message. The AI wants to write. After a few messages, it should learn to stick to a presented style and hopefully avoid it again. You may also add instructions in (OOC:) or chat memory or advanced prompt to avoid speaking for {{user}} and see if that helps.

My definitions are open and licensed under Creative Commons CC-BY-NC-SA (Attribution, Non-Commercial, Share Alike). You can find the full license definition here: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/

If something isn’t working on a bot or you have suggestions about the bot or tags, etc, feel free to leave a comment or review. I’m always eager to learn and improve. I welcome critical reviews, too - just please keep it respectful.

We’re all people here. Let’s be kind to one another.
creator: toebeansocks
